# INMediaReference.currentlyPlaying

**Case**

Indicates that the user is referring to the media item which is currently playing.

## Declaration

```swift
case currentlyPlaying
```

## Getting the Reference Status

- **INMediaReference.unknown**: Indicates that the media item is unknown.
- **INMediaReference.my**: Indicates that the specified content belongs to the user.

items.description: Indicates that the media item is unknown.
